# StdioClientTransportOptions.RestartOnUnexpectedExit property

When `true`, an unexpected child exit triggers an automatic restart via [`Launcher`](./Launcher.md) (spec §8.6.4-a SHOULD). When `null` (the default), restart is enabled iff a [`Launcher`](./Launcher.md) is supplied.

```csharp
public bool? RestartOnUnexpectedExit { get; set; }
```
